sections.paragraph:
κρύφιος, ία, ιον (s. two prec. entries; Hes. et al.; LXX; PsSol 8:9) hidden, secret τὰ κρύφια ἔργα 2 Cl 16:3. Subst. τὰ κ. hidden or secret things (LXX) 1 Cl 18:6 (Ps 50:8); B 6:10; IMg 3:2.—ἐν κρυφίᾳ in secret Mt 6:18 D.—DELG s.v. κρύπτω 5.

prec. prec. = preceding

Hes Hes , date uncertain, perh. before VI b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

PsSol PsSol = Psalms of Solomon—List 2

2 Cl 2 Cl = 2 Clement—List 1

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

B B = Barnabas (the Letter of), II a.d., except in series of uncial witnesses, in which case B refers to Codex Vaticanus (s. also Vat.). When the abbrv. B would ambiguous, Vat. is used for the codex.—List 1

IMg IMg = Ignatius to the Magnesians—List 1

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 572
